source.name: [🌴] Speed Run 4
source.description:
[🌴 The Summer Event]  - Explore Summer World,  collect ice creams, complete challenges, and unlock new items and levels!

Join in the fast paced fun and test your skill with this challenging platformer! There are dozens of unique levels to run and parkour through to victory. Each level has a unique song and appearance.. Can you reach all the final levels? Race your friends, or race against the clock and keep an eye on the timer, good luck!

Remember - you can unlock forbidden levels with stars.. and you can still unlock dimensions by beating the game of course.

Join our development team
https://www.roblox.com/My/Groups.aspx?gid=1234705

Speed Run 4's official Roblox Hat:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/14607948233/Speed-Run-4-Head

Tags: Colorful, Super, Speed, Fun, Obby, Parkour, Teamwork, Run, Victory, Win, Faster, Platformer, Clicker, Easy
